items.name: Evaluation-as-a-Service-EaaS-
items.description: Evaluation-as-a-Service (EaaS) is a scalable, production-ready evaluation platform designed to standardize, automate, and operationalize model assessment across machine learning and AI systems. It provides a centralized framework for benchmarking, monitoring, and validating model performance through reproducible, API-driven evaluation workflows.

items.name: Drift-Aware-Retraining-Pipeline
items.description: Drift Aware Retraining Pipeline is a production-ready machine learning infrastructure framework designed to detect data and concept drift and automatically trigger intelligent model retraining workflows. The system ensures sustained model performance in dynamic, real-world environments where data distributions continuously evolve.

items.name: ecommerce-product-categorization-ml
items.description: Machine learning framework for multi-class product categorization in e-commerce using structured metadata and textual features. Combines TF-IDF, transformer embeddings (MiniLM), and ensemble models (Logistic Regression, XGBoost, MLP) to predict hierarchical product categories with strong F1 performance.

items.name: Multi-Level-
items.description: A two-stage hierarchical stacking framework for Mineral Prospectivity Modeling (MPM) using ensemble machine learning methods.

items.name: PhiFlow
items.description: A differentiable PDE solving framework for machine learning

items.name: SmartInvoiceExtract
items.description: Smart Invoice Extract is a premium iOS application designed to simplify expense tracking. Leveraging on-device machine learning (Vision Framework), it instantly extracts data from invoices and receipts, organizing them into a beautiful, searchable history.

items.name: -Cardiovascular-Risk-Stratification-and-Prognostic-Modeling-Framework-Using-Advanced-ML
items.description: Heart disease is a leading cause of mortality, making early diagnosis crucial. Traditional methods are time-consuming and costly, but machine learning (ML) can improve accuracy and efficiency. ML models, such as Decision Trees, SVM, Random Forest, and Neural Networks, analyze patient data like age to predict heart disease risk.

items.name: Machine_Learning_Project
items.description: Questa repository contiene un framework  per la classificazione e l'analisi di stati quantistici bipartiti. Il progetto mira a distinguere gli stati quantistici in base a due proprietà fondamentali: l'Entanglement (tramite il criterio PPT) e la Non-località (tramite la violazione delle disuguaglianze di Bell).

Built as an educational decision-support tool using Python, FastAPI, and machine learning techniques.

items.name: Internship
items.description: This project explores time series forecasting using powerful machine learning approaches: Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) neural networks, XGBoost regression, FbProphet using Tensor flow, Keras, Scikit Frameworks.

items.description: Heart Disease Prediction web app built with React and Django REST Framework. It uses a trained machine learning model (scikit-learn) to analyze clinical inputs and predict the likelihood of heart disease. Features include real-time form inputs, REST API integration, data scaling, and probability-based predictions.

items.description: This repository contains a set of CMSSW modules and helper scripts designed to preprocess particle physics data (specifically from MINIAOD files) into flat `TTree` ROOT files. The resulting files are optimized for subsequent analysis, particularly for training machine learning models. The framework is configured to handle both AK15 jets with condor

items.name: Probabilistic-bitcoin-with-ML-
items.description: A Python-based framework designed to quantify risk in Bitcoin trading using Probabilistic Machine Learning. Most ML models fail in crypto because they ignore oratorical uncertainty (the inherent randomness of the market). This repo provides tools to build models that don't just predict the next move

items.name: Diabetes_Prediction_using_Machine_Learning
items.description: End-to-end machine learning framework for diabetes prediction. Leverages Local Outlier Factor (LOF) for anomaly detection and 10-fold cross-validation for model selection. Features an optimized ensemble of LightGBM and Gradient Boosting tuned via GridSearchCV for maximum sensitivity.

items.name: NN_regularization
items.description: This repository provides the numerical framework for solving ill-posed inverse problems using a regularization strategy based on the parametrization of the solution via a Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP). Unlike typical machine learning approaches, this method does not require training data and interprets the MLP as an implicit neural representation.

items.name: Beyond-Credit-Scores-Loan-Default-Prediction

Instead of treating borrowers as static profiles, the model captures dynamic financial patterns such as spending volatility, activity frequency, and temporal behavioral shifts.
